ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last active */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* Short bio or about me section for the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the user */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* User's privacy settings (e.g., public, private) */,
  "theme" TEXT /* User's preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "font_size" TEXT /* User's preferred font size (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "profile_visibility" TEXT /* User's profile visibility (e.g., public, private, friends) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL to the image attached to the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the post has received */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags associated with the post */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post (e.g., news, entertainment, sports) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the post (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "post_visibility" TEXT /* Post visibility (e.g., public, private, friends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Parent comment ID (NULL if the comment is a top-level comment) */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* Comment visibility (e.g., public, private, friends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the like is for (NULL if the like is for a comment) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the like is for (NULL if the like is for a post) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the post */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the share was made */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Share type (e.g., public, private, friends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "following" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follow relationship was created */,
  "follow_status" TEXT /* Follow request status (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_following_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_following_following_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., news, entertainment, sports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "moderator_level" TEXT /* Level of moderation (e.g., admin, senior, junior) */,
  "assigned_since" TEXT /* Date and time when the user became a moderator */,
  "moderator_role" TEXT /* Moderator role (e.g., admin, senior, junior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the action is for (NULL if the action is for a comment) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the action is for (NULL if the action is for a post) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., delete, edit, approve) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Additional details about the moderation action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the notification is for (NULL if the notification is for a comment) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the notification is for (NULL if the notification is for a post) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., like, comment, follow) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether email notifications are enabled */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether push notifications are enabled */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "notification_sound" INTEGER /* Whether notification sounds are enabled */,
  "notification_vibration" INTEGER /* Whether notification vibrations are enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the report is for (NULL if the report is for a comment) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the report is for (NULL if the report is for a post) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, post, comment) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_source" TEXT /* Source of the activity (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "activity_device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity (e.g., desktop, laptop, tablet, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
